acceptance_targets: [chapter_02_craft_001] Pass if the revised memory sequence anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:141 still shows specific sensory fragments and Thea's reaction, but no sentence in that span fully paraphrases the passage's moral meaning for the reader; Thea's shame must be legible through an observable action, sensation, or object interaction in the present-time room.

[chapter_02_prose_001] Pass if, after revision, no more than one of the targeted passages still resolves through a negation-then-redefinition formula and at least three of those same beats now end on a concrete physical or social detail that a reader can point to on the page.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised memory sequence anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:141 still shows specific sensory fragments and Thea's reaction, but no sentence in that span fully paraphrases the passage's moral meaning for the reader; Thea's shame must be legible through an observable action, sensation, or object interaction in the present-time room.
findings.problem: The schoolhouse dust-memory arrives with strong sensory setup, but the passage quickly resolves into a nearly complete moral lesson for Thea. Because the world's memory rule is supposed to stay fragmentary and sensory rather than fully explanatory, the sequence starts reading like a neatly themed proof point instead of an uncanny fragment that destabilizes her.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the memory passage around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:141 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:165 so it stays partial. Keep the cold room, the roster call, Ruthie's line, and Thea's present-time recoil, but replace the direct interpretive summary around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:161 with a concrete bodily or environmental consequence that lets the reader infer the shame without the narration fully closing the meaning.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, after revision, no more than one of the targeted passages still resolves through a negation-then-redefinition formula and at least three of those same beats now end on a concrete physical or social detail that a reader can point to on the page.
findings.problem: The chapter repeatedly lands on the same aphoristic negation-and-correction construction: a scene is first denied or minimized, then restated as a wiser abstract verdict. Used this many times, the move stops feeling sharp and starts reading like a house style tic, flattening the close-third texture into authored pronouncement rather than Thea's immediate, embodied perception.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the capstone lines at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:51, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:165, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:225, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:287, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_02.md:433 so only the single strongest turn keeps this rhetorical shape. In the other targeted spots, end on concrete body, object, or social-detail consequences instead of an abstract 'That was/It was/not X but Y' summation.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into queer secrecy, erotic specificity, dust-sick bodies, economic shame, bad bargains, and the humiliations of dependence. When deciding between a tidier scene and a truer one, choose the version that preserves historical pressure and emotional contradiction even if it leaves characters compromised, unsympathetic, or exposed.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If grief, desire, debt, illness, bodily damage, or shame are abstracted at the moment they should become sensory and social, rewrite toward the concrete consequence until the scene stops hiding from itself.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: moderate-high - contractions are the baseline for speech; uncontracted forms should appear only for emphasis, social performance, or character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate structural rhythms across the book: survival set-piece, aftermath inventory, intimate chamber scene, bureaucratic squeeze, outdoor search, quiet communal ritual, preparation without payoff, public reckoning, and departure elegy. Vary scene counts, dialogue density, and where the turn comes from so consecutive chapters never feel built from the same dramatic machine.
prose_style_profile.diction: Plainspoken and period-credible, with agricultural, domestic, and biblical undertones used sparingly; favor exact nouns and verbs over decorative frontier lyricism.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person rotating among Cora, Thea, Dell, August, and Hester, with only brief collective widening when weather or communal memory demands it
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Supple, pressure-sensitive prose: longer weather and labor sentences that can suddenly snap short at revelation, pain, or shame.
